lost_baggage: If your baggage did not arrive on your flight, please report it at the SkyCarrier baggage services desk in the arrivals area before you leave the airport. If you have already left the airport, call +1-555-SKY-BAGS within 24 hours with your baggage tag number. Claims for lost or delayed baggage are processed under the applicable international conventions; our agents will confirm exact limits and documentation requirements when you file a claim.
